title: Trump's 80th birthday marked by peace talks, dinner and a cage match
shortDescription: Trump's birthday activities include peace talks with Iran, a family dinner at the White House and watching a UFC fight.

title: Trump at 80: Here's how the body changes with age
shortDescription: As Donald Trump turns 80 here is what brain, heart, and bone changes come with aging and how to stay healthy.

title: Trump makes Georgia Senate pick in race to unseat Jon Ossoff. Here's who he endorsed
shortDescription: President Donald Trump waded into the runoff in Georgia's GOP Senate primary, endorsing Rep. Mike Collins over coach Derek Dooley to run against Sen. Jon Ossoff.

title: Trump's approval rating hits second-term low in new NBC poll
shortDescription: A new NBC News poll released June 14 found that President Donald Trump's approval rating hit a second-term low in the survey.

title: Donald Trump applauds historic New York Knicks win
shortDescription: President Donald Trump applauded the New York Knicks' first NBA Finals win in over 50 years. The Knicks beat the San Antonio Spurs 94-90.

title: Which Trump family members will be at the UFC event? What we know
shortDescription: President Donald Trump will spend his 80th birthday at the UFC Freedom 250 event at the White House. Which family members will be there?

title: The Bidens are back – Hunter and Jill, that is. They've got a lot to say
shortDescription: Over two years after President Joe Biden left the White House, both his son and his wife have plenty to say – and the internet is hanging on every word.

title: Donald Trump's legacy rests in the hands of federal courts
shortDescription: From immigration policy to elections and more, courts are poised to decide what President Donald Trump can accomplish in office.

title: Trump's name removed from Kennedy Center
shortDescription: Donald Trump's name is off the Kennedy Center after workers took down the president's signage past a deadline to comply with a judge's order.

title: Trump says Iran war deal to be signed Sunday, strait to reopen: Updates
shortDescription: President Donald Trump announced on Saturday that a deal with Iran was set to be signed the next day, along with an agreement on the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Workers remove Trump's name from Kennedy Center building — Photos
shortDescription: Crews worked on removing President Trump's name from the Kennedy Center's facade in Washington after a federal judge ordered its removal.

title: Trump's name taken off Kennedy Center after going past deadline
shortDescription: President Trump's name was taken off the Kennedy Center after a federal judge denied the administration's request that his order be put on hold.

title: US strike killed leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang, Trump says
shortDescription: President Trump said a US strike killed Hector Rusthenford Guerrero Flores, also known as Niño Guerrero, leader of Venezuelan gang Tren de Aragua.

title: SCOTUS ruling on birthright citizenship could derail Trump agenda
shortDescription: From immigration to elections, ballrooms to tax immunity, much of President Donald Trump’s second term legacy is mired in the courts.

title: Trump admin must restore history, science displays at parks by July 4
shortDescription: Federal judge orders exhibits and signs on topics like slavery and climate change that were removed be put back at parks and monuments by July 4th.

title: Trump suggests federal takeover of DC after mayoral election
shortDescription: President Donald Trump suggests the federal government could take control of Washington, DC, if a specific candidate wins.

title: Trump: 'Not happy' about turning 80
shortDescription: President Trump, who turns 80 on June 14th, said he is "not happy about that birthday that I'm having" in a video with Dr. Mehmet Oz.

title: President Trump's turning the big 8-0. He's 'not happy'
shortDescription: Trump might be touchy about becoming an octogenarian, but he has sought to draw a distinction between his own abilities and that of Biden's.

title: Trump to miss US World Cup opener, expected to attend final
shortDescription: President Trump is not attending the U.S. men's national team's World Cup opener in Los Angeles but is expected at the July 19 final.

title: Judges deny last-minute Trump appeal to keep his name on Kennedy Center
shortDescription: Although a judge ordered the removal of President Donald Trump's name from the Kennedy Center, a legal battle continues.

title: Federal judge extends block on Trump's $1.8B 'anti-weaponization fund'
shortDescription: A federal judge extended her block on Trump's proposed $1.8 billion fund to compensate people he said were unfairly targeted by the Justice Department

title: John Cornyn warns Trump could face 'disaster' in November midterm
shortDescription: Cornyn said there is growing sentiment among Senate Republicans that Trump was hurting his own party with "self-serving decisions."

title: Trump pushes back on Kennedy Center name removal
shortDescription: Visitors reacted to a judge's ruling to take President Donald Trump's name off the Kennedy Center, which has prompted the administration to appeal.

title: Trump says Iran war 'ended'
shortDescription: The president claimed the Iran war is over on a tele-rally with Georgia Lieutenant Governor Burt Jones.
